memberdef.argsstring: (const FrequencyDistribution &histo, frequency_distribution_transformation transform, int param, rounding mode=FLOOR)
memberdef.name: DiscreteDistributionData

briefdescription.para: Construction of a DiscreteDistributionData object from a FrequencyDistribution and a Distribution objects.
Construction of a DiscreteDistributionData object from a FrequencyDistribution and a DiscreteParametric objects.
Constructor by copy of the DiscreteDistributionData class.

parameterdescription.para: flag copy of the included DiscreteParametricModel object.

briefdescription.para: Assignment operator of the DiscreteDistributionData class.

memberdef.name: ascii_write

briefdescription.para: Writing of a DiscreteDistributionData object in a file at the spreadsheet format.
Plot of a DiscreteDistributionData object using Gnuplot.
Construction of a FrequencyDistribution object from a file. Format: n rows with ordered value and associated frequency.
